things.name: Celje Castle (Stari Grad)
things.description: One of Slovenia's largest and best-preserved medieval castles, the former seat of the Counts of Celje, with a dramatic hilltop setting and panoramic views

things.name: Museum of Recent History Celje
things.description: Modern museum in a renovated Old County Hall with engaging exhibitions on Celje's Roman heritage, the Counts of Celje and 20th-century history

things.name: Celje Regional Museum
things.description: Housed in the Princes' Palace, this museum displays archaeological treasures from Roman Celeia including the famous Celje Ceiling and classical artefacts

things.name: Main Square (Glavni trg)
things.description: The historic heart of Celje with the Plague Memorial from 1776, baroque Town Hall and the remains of the Roman forum beneath the cobblestones

things.name: Heroj Shpark
things.description: Central city park along the Savinja riverbank with walking paths, sports facilities and a leisure atmosphere in the heart of Celje

things.name: Counts of Celje Trail
things.description: Heritage walking trail connecting all major monuments associated with the powerful medieval Counts of Celje family, who ruled much of Central Europe

things.name: Thermal Spa Lasko
things.description: Popular thermal spa resort 10km from Celje in the valley town of Lasko, famous for its brewery and natural thermal waters

things.name: Celje Cathedral (St. Daniel's)
things.description: Gothic cathedral from the 13th century dedicated to St. Daniel, with notable Renaissance chapels and the tomb of the last Count of Celje

things.name: Savinja River Waterfront
things.description: Scenic riverside promenade along the emerald-green Savinja with kayaking in summer, cafes and views to the hills and forests surrounding Celje

things.name: Z'dezele Arena
things.description: Home of NK Celje, 2023-24 Slovenian champions who made history by qualifying for the UEFA Conference League group stage
